calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated OCT-21-2019 is admitted to probate. Megan Hastings is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-12-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
